title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom including excessive token consumption, companies reconsidering AI spend, and the issue that only 18% of tokens support shipped products. They also cover Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, AI-driven trading applications like Robinhood's offering, and privacy concerns around connecting personal accounts to AI services.
